exercises.title: Cryptographic Analysis
exercises.description: Calculate effective security of various key sizes.
exercises.starterCode:
key_sizes = [56, 80, 112, 128, 192, 256]
for bits in key_sizes:
    effective = bits // 2
    print(f'{bits} bits → {effective} effective')
exercises.solution:
key_sizes = [56, 80, 112, 128, 192, 256]
for bits in key_sizes:
    effective = bits // 2
    secure = 'SECURE' if effective >= 128 else 'WEAK'
    print(f'{bits} bits → {effective} effective ({secure})')
